Polar ECLIPSE School

Early Career Learning and Integration in Polar Science Engagement

Polar ECLIPSE School
Schedule Apply About us

About us

Vision: A resilient and integrated Polar community.

Mission: Strengthen, inspire, and engage the young Polar community.

Values: Autonomy, diversity, accessibility, and preservation.

More details about the organisers will follow soon. We have an organizer’s committee and a scientific committee.

Inspired by principles from JIRP.

Website based on ml4cryo.github.io and criticialscience.github.io. The code relies on jekyll and bulma.

The lunar eclipse featured on this website is by Dan Zafra and used with his kind permission.
